overview.title: Overview
overview.description: ML-powered book recommender; search, book pages, profile, daily retraining; portfolio demo, not a product.

versioning.title: Versioning & Status
versioning.description: Current features vs planned; portfolio demonstration with daily retraining; not a commercial service.

search.title: Search
search.description: Default Bayesian ranking; subject search stays Bayesian; title search by title similarity; optional subject filter.

troubleshooting.title: Troubleshooting
troubleshooting.description: Common issues: need ≥10 ratings, search ranking differences, profile edits, metadata gaps, chatbot memory expiry.

books.title: Book Pages
books.description: Book pages show metadata, ratings, comments, and Similar Books via Subject, ALS, or Hybrid (FAISS).

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Info, stats, interactions; subject-based recs with slider; ALS recs unlock after 10 ratings.

recommendations.title: How Recommendations Work
recommendations.description: Subject, ALS, and Hybrid recommendations with strengths/weaknesses; daily training updates.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.description: 10-rating rule, daily retrain delay, similar books, metadata gaps, improving recs, chatbot memory window.

limits.title: Known Limits
limits.description: ALS needs ≥10 ratings; cold-start fallback; metadata gaps; daily training required; internal chatbot not yet.

chatbot.title: Chatbot
chatbot.description: Login required; Web mode demo with 'Final Answer' line; internal mode planned; memory via Redis + cookie.

privacy.title: Data & Privacy
privacy.description: Login only for chatbot; chat memory in Redis + cookie; SSL; secure accounts; no third-party cookies.

glossary.title: Glossary
glossary.description: ALS, FAISS, Bayesian popularity, subject-attention embeddings, hybrid similarity, cold-start; LightGBM deprecated.
